concerns.text: FR-004 states the system MUST compute a composite score from *at least three* survey items, but FR-011 later allows construction of the engagement score with fewer than three proxy variables (with a limitation note). This creates a contradictory requirement about the minimum number of items.
FR-011 references '(See US-2)' but the user stories are not labeled with IDs like US-2; they are titled 'User Story 2'. The referenced identifier does not exist, breaking traceability.
FR-012 references '(See US-3)' which is also undefined; user stories lack US-3 identifiers.
SC-006 mentions '(See US-1)' but no US-1 identifier is defined in the document.
